containment.title: Operational Limits
containment.body: ≤300 ticks per PR, abort if entropy>0.7. Throttle to 1 sim/min.

description.title: Core Functionality
description.body: Deterministic sim to validate idle core under caps/overflow scenarios.

experiments.title: EXP-1
experiments.body: 100 ticks @ seed=42 → no entropy growth, yield snapshot saved

addenda.title: A1
addenda.body: Jupyter notebook for yield curve analysis planned
